query:
-- 1. Rimuovi già marcati come bounce/unsubscribed con source='bounce'
DELETE FROM subscribers WHERE status = 'unsubscribed' AND source = 'bounce';

-- 2. Rimuovi indirizzi generici/aziendali (servizio clienti, supporto, info, noreply, ecc.)
DELETE FROM subscribers WHERE status = 'active' AND (
  email LIKE 'support@%' OR
  email LIKE 'supporto@%' OR
  email LIKE 'info@%' OR
  email LIKE 'noreply@%' OR
  email LIKE 'no-reply@%' OR
  email LIKE 'donotreply@%' OR
  email LIKE 'do-not-reply@%' OR
  email LIKE 'admin@%' OR
  email LIKE 'amministrazione@%' OR
  email LIKE 'contatti@%' OR
  email LIKE 'contact@%' OR
  email LIKE 'hello@%' OR
  email LIKE 'help@%' OR
  email LIKE 'helpdesk@%' OR
  email LIKE 'service@%' OR
  email LIKE 'servizio@%' OR
  email LIKE 'clienti@%' OR
  email LIKE 'customer@%' OR
  email LIKE 'customerservice@%' OR
  email LIKE 'care@%' OR
  email LIKE 'postmaster@%' OR
  email LIKE 'webmaster@%' OR
  email LIKE 'marketing@%' OR
  email LIKE 'newsletter@%' OR
  email LIKE 'news@%' OR
  email LIKE 'press@%' OR
  email LIKE 'media@%' OR
  email LIKE 'ufficiostampa@%' OR
  email LIKE 'redazione@%' OR
  email LIKE 'segreteria@%' OR
  email LIKE 'reception@%' OR
  email LIKE 'office@%' OR
  email LIKE 'ufficio@%' OR
  email LIKE 'hr@%' OR
  email LIKE 'jobs@%' OR
  email LIKE 'careers@%' OR
  email LIKE 'lavoro@%' OR
  email LIKE 'billing@%' OR
  email LIKE 'fatturazione@%' OR
  email LIKE 'accounts@%' OR
  email LIKE 'privacy@%' OR
  email LIKE 'legal@%' OR
  email LIKE 'legale@%' OR
  email LIKE 'dpo@%' OR
  email LIKE 'gdpr@%' OR
  email LIKE 'abuse@%' OR
  email LIKE 'spam@%' OR
  email LIKE 'test@%' OR
  email LIKE 'demo@%' OR
  email LIKE 'example@%' OR
  email LIKE 'sales@%' OR
  email LIKE 'vendite@%' OR
  email LIKE 'commerciale@%' OR
  email LIKE 'direzione@%' OR
  email LIKE 'general@%' OR
  email LIKE 'info.%@%' OR
  email LIKE 'database@%'
);

-- 3. Conta finale
SELECT COUNT(*) AS lista_pulita FROM subscribers WHERE status = 'active';
